steps.actions: Minimal instruction-memory schema and boot-time version metadata implemented on embedded SurrealDB

steps.actions: Source-artifact rows now carry richer metadata and DB schema now includes explicit sidecar/diff substrate tables

steps.actions: Spec-compliant metadata parsing, dependency extraction, and hash-aware idempotent ingest hardened

steps.actions: First working instruction sidecar projection path implemented with deterministic patch application and projection receipts
